<!-- Chart CH-TIM-10 CONNECTED SCATTER, role-based (themeable) -->

## CONNECTED SCATTER chart (CH-TIM-10)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-10",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "change-over-time",
    "correlation"
  ],
  "form": "scatter with points connected in time order",
  "data_required": "one entity, two measures, several periods; the trajectory is the message",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-01 (one measure over time)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "many entities at one moment",
      "use": "CH-COR-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- trajectories: cost vs output, price vs volume, risk vs progress over years
- showing that the RELATIONSHIP moved, not just each measure

Do NOT use when:
- many entities (CH-COR-01)
- audiences unfamiliar with the form (it needs a walkthrough)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title stating the trajectory with numbers",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit_x": "on max x tick",
  "unit_y": "on max y tick",
  "points": "array of {label (period), x, y, highlight?} in TIME ORDER"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,

    },

      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 96,
      "right": 856,
      "top": 128,
      "bottom": 440
    },
    "dot_r": 6,
    "bubble_max_r": 28,
    "tick_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 12
    },
    "x_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 20
    },
    "point_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 8
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "connect": true,
    "y_zero": true,
    "target_ticks": 5,
    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ],
    "algorithm": "axes as CH-COR-01; a muted trail connects points in data order"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- points connect in data (time) order; the trail is muted, points labeled by period
- highlight the latest point
- both axes zero-based with algorithmic ticks

### Never do this
- arrows on every segment
- smoothing the trail
- unlabeled periods

### QA before delivering
- [ ] points in time order
- [ ] every point labeled with its period
- [ ] latest point highlighted
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| point | muted |
| point_highlight | primary |
| label | body |
| label_highlight | ink |
| gridline | gridline |
| zero_line | hairline |
| tick_label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
